units.source_text: 1 指約定金額被悉數取用而客戶又拖欠還款時涉及之最大風險額。
units.translation_target_text: 1 Refers to the maximum risk involved when the agreed amount is fully withdrawn and the customer defaults on repayment.
units.translation_en: 1 Refers to the maximum risk involved when the agreed amount is fully withdrawn and the customer defaults on repayment.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 1 Refers to the maximum risk involved when the agreed amount is fully withdrawn and the customer defaults on repayment.

units.source_text: 2 購入或承辦信貸已減值（「POCI」）。
units.translation_target_text: 2 Purchased or assumed credit is impaired (“POCI”).
units.translation_en: 2 Purchased or assumed credit is impaired (“POCI”).

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 2 Purchased or assumed credit is impaired (“POCI”).

units.source_text: 除非已在較早階段識別，否則所有金融資產均會於逾期30日時視為信貸風險大幅增加，並從第一級轉撥至第二級。下文按逾期少於及多於30日呈列第二級金融資產的賬齡，因此所列示的項目乃屬於因賬齡（逾期30日）
units.translation_target_text: Unless identified at an earlier stage, all financial assets will be deemed to have a significant increase in credit risk when overdue for 30 days and will be transferred from Level 1 to Level 2. The aging of Level 2 financial assets is presented below on the basis of less than and more than 30 days overdue, so the items presented are due to aging (30 days overdue)
units.translation_en: Unless identified at an earlier stage, all financial assets will be deemed to have a significant increase in credit risk when overdue for 30 days and will be transferred from Level 1 to Level 2. The aging of Level 2 financial assets is presented below on the basis of less than and more than 30 days overdue, so the items presented are due to aging (30 days overdue)

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Unless identified at an earlier stage, all financial assets will be deemed to have a significant increase in credit risk when overdue for 30 days and will be transferred from Level 1 to Level 2. The aging of Level 2 financial assets is presented below on the basis of less than and more than 30 days overdue, so the items presented are due to aging (30 days overdue)

units.source_text: 及因在較早階段已識別（逾期少於30日）而被歸類為第二級金融資產。
units.translation_target_text: and are classified as Level 2 financial assets because they have been identified at an earlier stage (overdue for less than 30 days).
units.translation_en: and are classified as Level 2 financial assets because they have been identified at an earlier stage (overdue for less than 30 days).

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: and are classified as Level 2 financial assets because they have been identified at an earlier stage (overdue for less than 30 days).
